systemStatus.detail:
Thu Jul 23 4:00 AM PT run (Gmail + live Google Business Profile review check; no live Google Ads/Yelp dashboard scrape this run).

TOAST: No Daily Performance Summary for WED JUL 22 in inbox as of 4:00 AM PT run (typically arrives ~6:30-7:40 AM PT, i.e. later today). Figures below are last-known TUE JUL 21 actuals: net $5,301.70 / gross $5,427.80 / 235 guests / 124 orders / labor 22.9% / 6 void items. SDLW comparison still unavailable (not cached).

SLING: No daily report for THU JUL 23 in inbox as of 4:00 AM PT run (typically arrives ~7:00 AM PT). Figures below are last-known WED JUL 22 schedule: 9 staff / 9 shifts / 37.90 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 1 off.

REVIEWS (live browser check, both listings -- source of truth per standing instruction): THE BREWHOUSE 4.5 stars / 519 reviews -- 1 unreplied (Nate B, 5-star, posted ~6 hours before this run). Ronald Johnson (3-star) and Thuy Anh Le (5-star photo-only), flagged unanswered in the prior run, no longer appear in the Unreplied tab -- have been replied to. BREWHOUSE COFFEE 5.0 stars / 3 reviews -- 1 unreplied (Christie Hahn, 5-star, posted 4 days ago, still pending -- draft reply reissued below).

YELP: 3 emails in window, all marketing newsletters (copy shop, ice cream, outdoor seating) -- 0 actionable customer inquiries.

GOOGLE ADS: 4 'report ready' notification emails (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report x2, Campaign performance x2) -- no disapproval or budget-alert language in any subject. No live dashboard scrape performed this run.

TRIPADVISOR: 1 email this run -- 'Your Ads are getting some MAJOR attention!' (ad performance/engagement notification).

Reservations and payroll sections carried forward unchanged (not in scope of this run).

reviews.lastUpdated: 2026-07-23 -- Thu Jul 23 4 AM run. LIVE browser check of both Google Business Profile Unreplied tabs (source of truth, per standing instruction -- both listings rendered successfully this run).
reviews.note: BOTH GOOGLE LISTINGS CHECKED LIVE via business.google.com Unreplied tabs. THE BREWHOUSE: only Nate B (5 stars, new, ~6 hrs old) remains unanswered -- Ronald Johnson (3 stars) and Thuy Anh Le (5 stars, photo-only), flagged in the prior run, have since been replied to. BREWHOUSE COFFEE: Christie Hahn (5 stars, posted Jul 19, now 4 days old) is still unanswered. NOTHING POSTED -- Joal approves every reply before it goes out.

unanswered.author: Nate B
unanswered.snippet: I really enjoyed this place. The burger was good. Great beer selection. Service was great. Prices were reasonable. I would definitely recommend this place.

unanswered.author: Christie Hahn
unanswered.snippet: A Perfect 10/10 Experience! If you are looking for a spot that takes both its craft and its hospitality seriously, this is it. The Coffee: Absolute perfection -- smooth, perfectly dialed-in espresso with velvety, flawless microfoam. The Service: incredibly welcoming and genuinely friendly staff.

toastPrevDay.note: [Rolled to prev-day on Wed Jul 22 7 AM run.] Toast Daily Performance Summary for TUESDAY JUL 21 not yet delivered at run time (arrives ~6:30-7:40 AM PT). Figures shown are last-known MON JUL 20 actuals: Net $3,799.70 / Gross $3,873.70 / 151 guests / 102 orders / avg guest $25.16 / avg order $37.25. Labor 34.9% of net (~$1,326) -- high as a percentage, but this is a low-volume Monday and last Monday (Jul 13) ran 35.8%, so labor is actually slightly better week-over-week. Discounts 1.9% (~$74), refunds $0, deferred $0, 4 void items, 83 card payments. ONE order left open at close; Julianna Ornelas and Harmony Willson auto-clocked out. vs SDLW (Mon Jul 13): net +$1,049.65 (+38.2%), gross +37.4%, guests +31 (+25.8%), orders +11 (+12.1%). A clearly stronger Monday than the week prior.

payroll.note: RESOLVED: Toast Payroll withdrawal for Jun 28-Jul 11 is SCHEDULED for today Jul 16 (Checking ..0653), pay date Jul 17 -- confirms payroll was submitted and funded. Withdrawal-notice email received Jul 16 12:12 AM PT.
